zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Nichols於1664年10月22日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿可馬可米德萊可時，她的父親John Nicholls36歲，母親Dorothy Parsons24歲。她於1684年10月22日與Hezekiah Rhodes I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1727年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年62歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Nichols于1664年10月22日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿可馬可米德萊可时，她的父亲John Nicholls36岁，母亲Dorothy Parsons24岁。她于1684年10月22日与Hezekiah Rhodes I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1727年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年62岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可可利斯丘其。

nameMeanings.name: Nichols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Nichol , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ); see also below.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Nicholls
meanings: English and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  .

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

variants.name: Nicols
meanings: English, Scottish, and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  . This surname is rare in the Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Nichols was born on 22 October 1664, in Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, John Nicholls, was 36 and her mother, Dorothy Parsons, was 24. She married Hezekiah Rhodes I on 22 October 1684, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 18 July 1727, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Nichols est née le 22 octobre 1664, à Middlesex, Accomack, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Nicholls, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Parsons, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Hezekiah Rhodes I le 22 octobre 1684, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 juillet 1727, à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Nichols am 22. Oktober 1664 in Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Nicholls 36 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Parsons 24. Sie hat am 22. Oktober 1684 in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America Hezekiah Rhodes I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Juli 1727 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Nichols è nata il il 22 ottobre 1664 nel Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Nicholls, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Parsons, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Hezekiah Rhodes I il 22 ottobre 1684, nel Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 18 luglio 1727, nel Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Nicholsが1664年10月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アッコイマックミッドレセックスで生まれた時，父John Nichollsは36歳，母Dorothy Parsonsは24歳であった。1684年10月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチでHezekiah Rhodes Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1727年7月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチで62歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスチリストチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Nichols(이)가 1664년 10월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 악코맥 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Nicholls(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Parsons(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1684년 10월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 처르치에서 Hezekiah Rhodes I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1727년 7월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Nichols nasceu em 22 de outubro de 1664, em Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Nicholls, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Parsons, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Hezekiah Rhodes I em 22 de outubro de 1684, em Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de julho de 1727, em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Christchurch, Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British C: миддлесекс, аккомакк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Brit: краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Unit: краист чурч, миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Nichols родилась 22 октября 1664 г. в местности миддлесекс, аккомакк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Nicholls было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Parsons, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hezekiah Rhodes I 22 октября 1684 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 18 июля 1727 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Nichols nació el 22 de octubre de 1664, en Middlesex, Accomack, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, John Nicholls, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Dorothy Parsons, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hezekiah Rhodes I el 22 de octubre de 1684, en Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 18 de julio de 1727, en Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
